author: Claude Code
content:
Applied 5 token-optimization fixes.

**Files changed:**
- `CLAUDE.md` — 226 → 38 lines. Verbose workflow moved to steering wiki page. Removed directory-scan fallback, dropped empty-section stub guidance (moved into steering).
- `template/CLAUDE.md` — synced.
- `.project/wiki/pages/steering-tracker-workflow.md` — new steering page with full workflow detail, file formats, skill list, sync commands.
- `.project/wiki/_index.json` — registered new page under `steering` parent.
- `.project/skills/{add-comment,update-status,standup,wiki-update,create-issue,track-work,review-ticket,document-completion}/SKILL.md` — shortened `description` frontmatter (≤15 words each).
- `.project/skills/create-issue/SKILL.md` — description.md template now skips empty sections.
- `.project/skills/review-ticket/SKILL.md` — progressive load (last 3 comments first, older on demand); subtasks via index, not directory scan.
- `.project/skills/track-work/SKILL.md` — same progressive-load pattern; title lookup via index.
- `demo/.project/skills/*` — same edits applied; rsynced to `template/.project/skills/`.

**Fixes mapped to original 5:**
1. Slim CLAUDE.md + steering page ✅
2. Shorten skill descriptions ✅
3. Progressive load in review-ticket/track-work ✅
4. Removed scan-fallback language (CLAUDE.md, track-work, review-ticket, standup) ✅
5. Create-issue: only non-empty sections ✅

**Estimated savings:** ~2k tokens per turn from CLAUDE.md slimming + ~200 tokens per turn from skill descriptions. Review-ticket/track-work save 500–3k tokens per invocation on issues with many comments.
